title: Fix HtnTaskLibrary.MakeAction Arguments Dictionary Mutability
description:
Research Report R2-004 (Confidence 93%, Medium). HtnTaskLibrary.MakeAction mutates the Arguments dictionary after init-only construction. The dictionary reference is init-only but contents are mutable — a subtle gotcha that could cause bugs if the dictionary is replaced or shared across threads.

Fix: Either freeze the dictionary after construction (ImmutableDictionary), clone before mutation, or document the pattern explicitly with a warning comment.

Source: research-MemorySmith.Agent Codebase Audit Sprint-35, Council Addendum 2026-06-26
